Title: Market

[Button Text](https://znagathering.com/program/)

# MarKET

![Image 8](https://znagathering.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/ZNA-2026-The-Market-1-Amir.jpg)

**Welcome Party**

This party that welcomes everyone that chose our shuttle/bus service. While everyone else needs to wait for the official gate opening on the morning of the 15th the shuttle/bus guests will have the chance to expirience this line up exclusively for their delight.

This acts will not be performing at the ZambuTemple this year but they will do their best to leave their mark on everyone that attends to this session

## WelcoMe Party LiNeUp

![Image 9](https://znagathering.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/Goastral2_500x500.jpg)

##### Ovinmoon Rec_BR

### GoAstral

[](https://znagathering.com/program/marketstage/#)

From the heart of Brazil to the ZambuTemple, we welcome GoaAstral.
A journey shaped by deep psychedelic storytelling, hypnotic layers, and a powerful connection to the dancefloor, GoaAstral brings a sound that moves between cosmic intensity and spiritual elevation crafted for true immersive experiences.

Prepare for a set where time dissolves, energy expands, and the night becomes a shared ritual under the same frequency.

We are very excited to have GoaAstral join us for this edition.

[](https://www.facebook.com/GOAstral)[](https://soundcloud.com/goastral?utm_id=97758_v0_s00_e233_tv0&fbclid=IwY2xjawSBPFZleHRuA2FlbQIxMABicmlkETFNektYbFdYMzdBVnd0c1M1c3J0YwZhcHBfaWQQMjIyMDM5MTc4ODIwMDg5MgABHnF9McDjhw8V0YE82YjWXtr0pd9E55IgdmLKNj4aSWQgye8d9XIhZJd2Z6wC_aem_ntDSUEKeRZU5t7Xb1-gOfw)

![Image 10](https://znagathering.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/Max_Lanfranconi_500x500.jpg)

##### Etnica net_IT

### Max Lanfranconi

[](https://znagathering.com/program/marketstage/#)

From the legacy of Etnica to the Welcome Paerty of ZNA Gathering 2026, we are honoured to welcome Max Lanfranconi.
A defining force behind iconic projects such as Etnica, Pleiadians, and Crop Circles, Max has helped shape the very foundations of psychedelic trance as we know it today.

Over the years, his sets at the ZambuTemple have become known for delivering truly epic and unforgettable moments, the kind of peak experiences that stay with us long after the music fades.

This time, however, we felt it was time to bring that energy into a more intimate setting: our Welcome Party. A rare opportunity to experience his musical journey up close, in a space designed for connection, warmth, and shared anticipation for what is to come.

We couldn’t be more excited to open this edition with him.

[](https://www.discogs.com/artist/76336-Max-Lanfranconi)[](https://www.facebook.com/etnicanet.recordings)

![Image 11](https://znagathering.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/Sharon_500x500.jpg)

##### StoneAge rec_IL

### Sharon

[](https://znagathering.com/program/marketstage/#)

First introduced to the world of Goa trance in 2017, Sharon Haiat quickly established his presence in the scene through his dedicated curation of Goa classics and his energetic DJ performances.
From his very first year, he began playing at events, steadily refining his craft and developing fluid, story-driven sets with seamless mixing and strong narrative flow.

As a label DJ for StoneAge Records, his sound spans a wide range of styles, weaving adventurous, mind-expanding journeys designed for the dancefloor. This makes him a natural representative and craftsman for the welcome party, specially after expirience his powerfull performance at the last Goa Guardians edition back in 2022.

[](https://www.facebook.com/sharon.haiat)[](https://soundcloud.com/sharon-haiat)

![Image 12](https://znagathering.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/Virtuart_500x500.jpg)

##### SunTrip Rec_FR

### Virtuart

[](https://znagathering.com/program/marketstage/#)

From France to the ZambuTemple, we are happy to welcome Olivier Abitbol, known as Virtuart.
Known for his immersive sonic journeys and finely crafted melodies, Virtuart brings a sound that blends depth, precision, and emotional intensity, designed to guide dancers through evolving states of energy and consciousness.

Expect a set that moves with intention, building atmospheres that unfold naturally into powerful, hypnotic moments on the dancefloor, drawing on the rich body of work and sonic explorations he developed throughout the 90s.

We are truly excited to have him join us for this edition.

[](http://virtuart.free.fr/)[](https://www.discogs.com/artist/15855-Virtuart)[](https://znagathering.com/program/marketstage/)

![Image 13](https://znagathering.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/X_Tigma_500x500.jpg)

##### Quest 4 Goa_PT

### X-Tigma

[](https://znagathering.com/program/marketstage/#)

For our Welcome Party at the Market Stage, we are happy to welcome Pedro Dias, also known as X_T.i.g.m.a.
A long-term collector of diverse musical genres and styles, Pedro is also an experienced event producer, promoter, and, above all, a dedicated DJ.

Co-founder of the Quest4Goa collective in 1999, his journey as a DJ and producer has been deeply rooted in the evolution of intentional gatherings, actively contributing ever since through collaborations with movements and organizations that continue to shape and advance the trance culture.

When behind the decks, his selections move fluidly across a wide aesthetic spectrum, always carrying a subtle experimental edge and a strong sense of narrative flow.

Deeply embedded in the ZNA spirit and a long-standing collaborator of our Gathering, we are proud to host X_T.i.g.m.a. once again for a truly idiosyncratic and consciously curated sonic experience to open our Welcome Party at the Market stage.

[](https://soundcloud.com/x_tigma)[](https://www.mixcloud.com/x_tigma/)

**![Image 14: 🛸](https://s.w.org/images/core/emoji/16.0.1/svg/1f6f8.svg) Market: A Portal to Psychedelic Frontiers**

Music is our universal language.

While we remain rooted in a powerful and visionary concept, we also delight in stepping beyond the familiar – challenging the status quo and exploring new dimensions of psychedelia.

At the heart of the bustling flea-market lies The Market – a haven for the adventurous Zambus seeking to traverse uncharted sonic landscapes.

Curated by the boundary-pushing minds behind Boshke Beat Records, this space is a gateway to diverse, cutting-edge and retro-futuristic electronic beats.

The eagerly awaited line-up and program, shaped by Boshke Beat’s creative vision, will be revealed in the coming months.

Prepare to be captivated by a dynamic spectrum of sound that defies convention and ignites the imagination.

## MarkeT LiNeUp

![Image 15](blob:http://localhost/4e38c5e92f9a00bc3a5d7d37cf133d56)

### Alex Tolstey_PA

[](https://znagathering.com/program/marketstage/#)

A respected figure within the global psychedelic scene, Alex Tolstey brings more than three decades of experience behind the decks. Widely known as the driving force behind Boshke Beats Records, he has overseen and produced more than 300 releases, shaping the sound and visual identity of one of the scene's most influential labels. Alex also serves as the art director and manager of X-Dream, further cementing his long-standing role within the culture.

 As the curator of the Market Stage lineup at ZNA, Alex brings the same dedication and refined taste to his DJ sets. Expect a deeply crafted sonic journey where rare selections, lysergic house, and psychedelic techno unfold in a sophisticated and hypnotic flow—sounds carefully chosen to create moments that can only be experienced during his sets.

[](http://www.boshkebeats.com/)[](https://linktr.ee/boshkebeatsrecords)[](https://soundcloud.com/boshkebeatsrecords/sets/alex-tolstey-boshke-beats)

![Image 16](blob:http://localhost/4e38c5e92f9a00bc3a5d7d37cf133d56)

### Alien Rain_DE

[](https://znagathering.com/program/marketstage/#)

Berlin-based DJ and producer Milton Bradley, also known as Alien Rain, has long been a respected figure within the city's underground techno circles. Renowned for his hypnotic acid techno sets and unmistakable 303-driven productions, he has held residencies at some of Berlin's most respected clubs while performing at venues around the world. A dedicated collector and crate digger since the late 1980s, Milton's vast record archive reflects decades of deep immersion in electronic music culture.

 For the Market Stage at ZNA Gathering, Alien Rain arrives as a special guest, diving into a carefully curated selection of psychedelic dance music from the formative years between 1988 and 1993. Expect a rare journey through EBM, proto-Goa, acid house, and Belgian beat—an evocative flashback to the early days of Goa beaches and the dark club corners of Antwerp's legendary nightlife.

[](https://soundcloud.com/do-not-resist-the-beat)[](https://soundcloud.com/radiozora/alien-mix-for-alex)

![Image 17](blob:http://localhost/4e38c5e92f9a00bc3a5d7d37cf133d56)

### Anais-Lin_BR

[](https://znagathering.com/program/marketstage/#)

Shaped by an odyssey across dancefloors around the world, Anaïs Lin brings a rich and eclectic perspective to her sets. From gatherings in the Himalayas to the iconic desert stages of Burning Man, her musical journey reflects years of exploration through diverse underground scenes.

 Moving fluidly between tempos and textures, Anaïs-Lin blends digital and vinyl selections into deep, dark, and psychedelic soundscapes. As part of the Padang Records family, she channels a distinctive fusion of psytech and progressive grooves, crafting sets that guide dancers through evolving rhythms and hypnotic atmospheres. With a subtle yet powerful feminine spirit, her performances focus on igniting movement on the dancefloor while engaging the mind in a truly immersive journey.

[](https://soundcloud.com/anaislin)

![Image 18](blob:http://localhost/4e38c5e92f9a00bc3a5d7d37cf133d56)

### Andrew Till_AU

[](https://znagathering.com/program/marketstage/#)

With a career spanning more than three decades, Andrew Till stands as one of the true pioneers of Australia's electronic music movement. As a DJ, producer, A&R, manager, and mentor, he has played a significant role not only in establishing the country's underground scene but also in shaping its evolution into a thriving global culture.

 Known for his deep musical knowledge and visionary approach to sound, Andrew continues to explore forward-thinking electronic music with the same passion that defined the early days of the movement. At the Market Stage of ZNA 2026, he will guide listeners through a journey of deep, hypnotic rhythms and immersive grooves—timeless sounds from an artist who remains as inspired and dedicated as ever.

[](https://soundcloud.com/andrewtill)[](https://znagathering.com/program/marketstage/)[](https://znagathering.com/program/marketstage/)

![Image 19](blob:http://localhost/4e38c5e92f9a00bc3a5d7d37cf133d56)

### Bill Robin & Maya Wada_UK

[](https://znagathering.com/program/marketstage/#)

Born and raised in South London, Bill Robin developed an early passion for electronic music after witnessing Kraftwerk live at the age of nine. By his early teens he was already DJing house parties and soon after played his first proper acid house event in 1988 beneath the infamous Brixton railway arches on Coldharbour Lane. Since then, Bill has performed across the UK club circuit and released music under various aliases, exploring a wide spectrum of styles including acid, techno, breakbeat, hardcore, jungle, dub and downtempo. His work has appeared on labels such as Harthouse, and he was also involved in one of the earliest dubstep releases alongside Horsepower Productions.

 Joining him is Maya Wada, whose music explores the intuitive and atmospheric dimensions of sound. Through spacious ambient textures and subtle rhythmic elements, she creates immersive sonic environments where vibrations, harmonies and frequencies merge into a unified experience. Together, Bill Robin and Maya Wada weave a deep and exploratory journey that bridges underground dance culture with expansive, meditative soundscapes.

[](https://soundcloud.com/billrobin)[](https://www.mixcloud.com/billrobin)[](https://soundcloud.com/maya-wada-983351163/picnic-wakayama)[](https://soundcloud.com/maya-wada-983351163)

![Image 20](blob:http://localhost/4e38c5e92f9a00bc3a5d7d37cf133d56)

### Cheers_IL

[](https://znagathering.com/program/marketstage/#)

Cheers is drawn to the original spark of psychedelic dance music. Rooted in the formative sounds of proto-Goa, new beat, and early trance, his sets channel the raw energy and exploratory spirit of the late '80s and early '90s. With a strong focus on selection and flow, Cheers builds journeys that favour tension, character, and movement over trends or excess.

 A dedicated vinyl digger, he spends countless hours uncovering hidden gems and overlooked classics, carefully restoring and refining them for modern dancefloors. Alongside his deep collection, he also crafts subtle edits of old-school material—preserving its essence while allowing it to resonate on contemporary sound systems. The result is a warm, groove-driven and subtly psychedelic experience where nostalgia meets fresh momentum on the dancefloor.

[](https://soundcloud.com/djcheers303)

![Image 21](blob:http://localhost/4e38c5e92f9a00bc3a5d7d37cf133d56)

### Damir Ludvig_HR

[](https://znagathering.com/program/marketstage/#)

Damir Ludvigis an award-winning film and music producer, composer, DJ, lyricist, and journalist. He has received three awards for music documentary productionat the New York International Independent Film and Video Festival.As an international DJ and electronic music artist, Ludvig has built a career spanning more than three decades. He is the creator of the project Ludvig & Stelar, with releases on Café del Mar Musicas well as labels including PlattenBank, Baroque, Clinique, and Toolroom

[](https://www.mixcloud.com/DamirLudvig/)

![Image 22](blob:http://localhost/4e38c5e92f9a00bc3a5d7d37cf133d56)

### Earl Peal_EE

[](https://znagathering.com/program/marketstage/#)

Estonian artist Johannes Eriste, performing as Earl Peal, has spent years quietly exploring different musical landscapes. Initially active as a drummer in various Estonian bands, Johannes gained extensive stage experience performing at festivals across the country before gradually turning his focus toward electronic music production.

 Working closely with Alex Tolstey, he has recently begun shaping a new sonic direction, collaborating on productions and remixes for artists such as Extrawelt, X-Dream, and Holeg Spies. At the Market Stage of ZNA 2026, Earl Peal presents a fresh selection of his latest material—lysergic indie techno with a subtle psychedelic twist, crafted for deep and immersive dancefloor moments.

[](http://www.earlpeal.com/)

![Image 23](blob:http://localhost/4e38c5e92f9a00bc3a5d7d37cf133d56)

### E~SKO_IL

[](https://znagathering.com/program/marketstage/#)

E-Sko creates a warm and uplifting atmosphere guided by his deep love for old-school trance. Drawing from a carefully collected selection of classic tracks gathered over many years, his sets focus on mood, pacing, and timeless melodies that naturally connect with the dancefloor.

 With an understated and sincere approach, E~SKO favors steady momentum and music that carries emotional clarity—sounds that gently move the crowd forward while keeping the energy unified. There is a quiet confidence in his style and a deep respect for the spirit of the music. When he plays, he joins the journey together with the dancers, shaping a vibe that feels warm, simple, and genuinely shared.

[](https://soundcloud.com/user-622715999)

![Image 24](blob:http://localhost/4e38c5e92f9a00bc3a5d7d37cf133d56)

### Extrawelt_DE

[](https://znagathering.com/program/marketstage/#)

For over thirty years, Extrawelt — Arne Schaffhausen and Wayan Raabe — have been living and breathing electronic music, carving a unique path through the spectrum of dance sounds where the ordinary ends and the extraordinary begins. Starting as DJs, they discovered their production voice in the studio of Hamburg's X-Dream, inspiring early projects such as Midimiliz and Spirallianz.

 In 2005, they launched Extrawelt, with their breakthrough single Soopertrack released by Border Community, setting the stage for a prolific career of releases, remixes, and worldwide performances. Known for their immersive live shows, Extrawelt's act is more than a performance — it has earned international recognition and awards as one of the finest live acts in the techno scene, playing in clubs and festivals across the globe. Their music bridges the purity of classic techno with forward-thinking sound design, creating a live experience that honors the past while pointing to the future.

[](http://www.extrawelt.com/)

![Image 25](blob:http://localhost/4e38c5e92f9a00bc3a5d7d37cf133d56)

### Gabi von Dub_PT

[](https://znagathering.com/program/marketstage/#)

Celebrating over 27 years behind the decks, Gabi von Dub remains true to his essence, crafting expansive and hypnotic grooves that captivate both the wicked and the curious. A long-time fixture of ZNA Gathering, he has performed across countless stages, from the most energetic dancefloors to the deepest chill zones.

 Renowned for his long, immersive sets, Gabi weaves together techno, trance, and eclectic funk-infused detours, all underpinned by an old-school free party spirit. Each performance is a carefully unfolding journey, designed to guide the crowd through a seamless flow of energy, movement, and connection.

[](https://www.mixcloud.com/Augen/)

![Image 26](blob:http://localhost/4e38c5e92f9a00bc3a5d7d37cf133d56)

### Gabriel Le Mar_DE

[](https://znagathering.com/program/marketstage/#)

Based in Frankfurt, Gabriel Le Mar has been shaping deep electronic sounds since the early '90s, with a focus on dub-inspired tech house and immersive club rhythms. Drawing on the mixing techniques of Jamaican dub, he fuses heavy basslines with the physical energy of the dancefloor, creating music that moves both body and mind.

 Through his Aural Float project, Gabriel explored the experimental side of electronic music, producing three albums rich in live sound manipulations, fat bass, and emotional electronica. With Saafi Brothers, he delved deeper into ambient-dub, blending introspective beginnings with danceable rhythms, a signature heard in their acclaimed live shows. At ZNA 2026 Market Stage, Gabriel Le Mar brings a special live + DJ set—an energetic fusion of dub techno, tech house, and hypnotic psychedelic beats designed to move the crowd from start to finish.

[](https://www.isoquant-music.com/)

![Image 27](blob:http://localhost/4e38c5e92f9a00bc3a5d7d37cf133d56)

### James Monro_UK

[](https://znagathering.com/program/marketstage/#)

A pioneer of the early UK trance scene, James Monro has shaped the psychedelic dance music landscape for decades. With hundreds of releases to his name, he is celebrated not only as a DJ but also as a versatile producer, blending styles across trance, progressive techno, and house while maintaining a strong psychedelic edge.

 As one of the inspirations behind the creation of the Market Stage at ZNA, James Monro returns in 2026 to deliver an extended closing set, guiding the crowd through a masterful journey of progressive techno beats and hypnotic psychedelic house grooves—a fitting finale for the festival's most intimate stage.

[](https://soundcloud.com/jamesmonro)

![Image 28](blob:http://localhost/4e38c5e92f9a00bc3a5d7d37cf133d56)

### Joti Sidhu_UK

[](https://znagathering.com/program/marketstage/#)

Also known as Psychaos, Joti Sidhu has worked with music luminaries such as Dave Allen (The Cure), Andy Wright (Andy Wright), and Mark "Spike" Stent. His productions have appeared on labels including XL Recordings, Dragonfly, Perfecto, Atomic, and Neurobiotic, among many others.

 Under various aliases, including Jhothi on Kenny Dope's Dopewax and releases on Todd Terry's Terminator Records, Joti Sidhu blends psychedelic, techno, and crossover sounds with rich historical perspective. At the Market Stage in 2026, he will deliver a special three-hour retrospective set, revisiting the early acid house of the late '80s and the formative techno-trance of the early '90s—an immersive journey of hypnotic grooves, psychedelic textures, and timeless energy, crafted exclusively for the Market's audience.

[](https://soundcloud.com/jhothi)

![Image 29](blob:http://localhost/4e38c5e92f9a00bc3a5d7d37cf133d56)

### KLIL.co_IL

[](https://znagathering.com/program/marketstage/#)

At just 23, Klil.co has already carved a name for herself as a passionate curator of early electronic sounds. Drawn to acid and Goa trance from a young age, she has dedicated herself to collecting and studying the finest tracks from the past, building a deep knowledge of early '90s techno and trance on vinyl and CD.

 Her sets are the product of extensive research and heartfelt connection to the music, carefully unfolding beat by beat. For the Market Stage in 2026, Klil.co will deliver a very special set featuring rare and early proto-Goa, acid techno, and Belgian beat—a journey into the origins of psychedelic dance music guided by both precision and passion.

[](https://on.soundcloud.com/tVeov28mZCTWBvqQJO)[](https://www.instagram.com/dj.klil.co)

![Image 30](blob:http://localhost/4e38c5e92f9a00bc3a5d7d37cf133d56)

### Mark Van Der Vlugt_UK

[](https://znagathering.com/program/marketstage/#)

Mark Van Der Vlugt began his journey in electronic music after moving to Germany in 1986, attending iconic techno clubs such as Warehouse in Cologne, Dorian Gray, Omen, and XS in Frankfurt. A transformative trip to Goa in 1992 exposed him to free parties and psychedelic sounds, shaping a lifelong approach to electronic music.

 A true pioneer of the psychedelic scene, Mark brings his exceptional DJ skills and deep record knowledge to the Market Stage, delivering slow, progressive, acid-tinged, and techno-influenced sets. His performances feature rare and exclusive selections, inspired by previous appearances at ZNA in 2022 and 2024, and promise a hypnotic, unforgettable journey for the crowd.

[](https://soundcloud.com/radiozora/mark-van-der-vlugt-boshke-beats-series-ep-50-04112022)

![Image 31](blob:http://localhost/4e38c5e92f9a00bc3a5d7d37cf133d56)

### Mathew Jonson presents Freedom Engine Live_CA

[](https://znagathering.com/program/marketstage/#)

Mathew Jonson is widely recognized for his distinctive voice in electronic dance music, blending progressive house, techno, and experimental textures into unforgettable live performances. With a career spanning two decades, Jonson has honed a sound that fuses analog warmth, melodic depth, and hypnotic rhythms, delivering music that is instantly recognizable yet endlessly inventive.

 At ZNA 2026, he presents a special four-hour Freedom Engine live set for the Market Stage—an exclusive journey through epic grooves, introspective textures, and floor-focused rhythms. From his early productions to work with Cobblestone Jazz, Midnight Operator, and Wagon Repair, Jonson continues to push the boundaries of electronic music, combining analog mastery, deep groove, and a rare live performance energy that has earned him acclaim as one of the scene's most visionary artists.

[](http://www.soundcloud.com/mathew-jonson)[](http://www.facebook.com/MathewJonson/)

![Image 32](blob:http://localhost/4e38c5e92f9a00bc3a5d7d37cf133d56)

### Psara_PT

[](https://znagathering.com/program/marketstage/#)

Sara Marrecas, performing as Psara for Psy-Harmonics label, is a dancer first and a DJ second, bringing movement and storytelling into every performance. Whether playing live instruments, singing, or guiding the crowd behind the decks, she channels energy and spirit into her sets, creating a deep, immersive connection with the audience.

 At the Market Stage of ZNA 2026, Psara presents a journey through the slower, deeper side of psychedelic dance techno and progressive lysergic sounds. Her sets are carefully crafted storylines, designed to move both body and mind, weaving hypnotic grooves, emotional textures, and expansive sonic landscapes for a truly transformative experience.

[](https://www.mixcloud.com/Psara/)

![Image 33](blob:http://localhost/4e38c5e92f9a00bc3a5d7d37cf133d56)

### Ray Castle_AU

[](https://znagathering.com/program/marketstage/#)

A true pioneer of psychedelic electronic music, Ray Castle is not only a DJ and producer but also an author, astrologist, and global influencer in the psytrance and electronic community. His decades of experience and mentorship have shaped countless artists and inspired audiences worldwide.

 At the Market Stage of ZNA 2026, Ray Castle brings a high-energy selection of psychedelic techno and lysergic funk grooves. Describing his style as "groovilicious space boogie psy-electro-bass tek house disco," he promises a set designed to move the crowd, ignite the dancefloor, and deliver immersive, unforgettable sonic journeys to the restless Zambus.

[](https://linktr.ee/raycastle)

![Image 34](blob:http://localhost/4e38c5e92f9a00bc3a5d7d37cf133d56)

### Ree K_JP

[](https://znagathering.com/program/marketstage/#)

Ree K is an artist without boundaries, forging her own unique path through electronic music since the 1980s. Starting her DJ career in 1992, she founded her party organization Space Gathering in 1997 and the band Kinocosmo in 1998. She has released numerous mix CDs and compilations, including Cubism, Alpha, Omega, Quantum Leap, and Early Tracks 1, alongside running her own label Hypnodisk.

 Ree K's sets and productions are a multidimensional patchwork of sound, blending eclectic influences into immersive sonic journeys. At ZNA 2026, she continues to push herself further into new musical dimensions, offering the Market Stage a hypnotic, boundary-defying experience that moves the mind and body alike.

[](https://www.mixcloud.com/reek2013/)[](https://www.instagram.com/ree_k/)[](https://www.facebook.com/official.ree.k/)

![Image 35](blob:http://localhost/4e38c5e92f9a00bc3a5d7d37cf133d56)

### Robert Leiner aka The Source Experience_SE

[](https://znagathering.com/program/marketstage/#)

Robert Leiner, performing as The Source Experience, is one of the hidden architects of '90s electronic music. Blending techno, trance, acid, and ambient, he creates immersive live performances built on hypnotic analog layers and raw visionary energy. Drawing inspiration from Kraftwerk, Tangerine Dream, and Brian Eno, Leiner has forged a singular voice that transcends genre boundaries.

 From his early releases on R&S Records to acclaimed albums such as Visions of the Past and Different Journeys, he has continuously explored both uptempo acid tracks and introspective ambient techno. At the Market Stage of ZNA 2026, Robert Leiner channels electronic music itself, guiding the audience through hypnotic, challenging, and deeply transformative sonic journeys. As he puts it: "It has always been there, you just have to discover it."

[](https://www.instagram.com/source66/)[](https://www.facebook.com/thesourceexperienceofficial/)[](https://www.youtube.com/@thesourceexperience)[](https://linktr.ee/thesourceexperience)

![Image 36](blob:http://localhost/4e38c5e92f9a00bc3a5d7d37cf133d56)

### Sancho Meiso Chaya_JP

[](https://znagathering.com/program/marketstage/#)

Shin Sasama, performing as Sancho Meiso Chaya, is a versatile artist whose career spans roots dub, ska, pop production, and experimental electronic music. Beginning as a saxophonist in bands such as Cultivator and Cool Wise Man, he later launched solo projects exploring ambient, minimal-house, and deep psychedelic techno. Collaborations include Lo Hype, Yuta Chaya, Chaya & Kojiro, and Sancho Meiso Chaya & Koyas.

 At the Market Stage of ZNA 2026, Sancho Meiso Chaya presents a live set using his analogue synths and rhythm generators, delivering exclusive, rare, and hypnotic deep psychedelic techno from Japan. His performance promises immersive soundscapes and experimental textures, combining technical mastery with the spirit of live improvisation.

[](https://linktr.ee/sanchomeisochaya)

![Image 37](blob:http://localhost/4e38c5e92f9a00bc3a5d7d37cf133d56)

### Tecnica_IT

[](https://znagathering.com/program/marketstage/#)

Tecnica is the hypnotic, groovier side project of the acclaimed Italian psychedelic trance duo Etnica, consisting of Max Lafranconi and Maurizio Begotti. Focusing on slower, progressive grooves, Tecnica blends deep textures, melodic layers, and immersive rhythms that contrast with their high-energy psytrance output.

 At the Market Stage of ZNA 2026, Tecnica delivers a special and exclusive sunset DJ set, guiding the audience through hypnotic, melodic, and groovy soundscapes. Their performance promises an intimate, transformative experience, perfect for the golden hour and the magical vibes of the festival's Market area.

[](https://open.spotify.com/artist/7mCfDu4cDYxtXjjzX6PgWh?si=GUV0tIrZSRmTLprmjzuNbQ)

![Image 38](blob:http://localhost/4e38c5e92f9a00bc3a5d7d37cf133d56)

### Triple Distilled Disco Squad_EE

[](https://znagathering.com/program/marketstage/#)

Triple Distilled Disco Squad is the unpredictable, eclectic alter ego of Alex Boshke Tolstey, spinning a mix that spans disco, techno, trance, and electro. Known for sets with no plan and no preps—just feel and flow—Alex creates an experience that is both rare and unforgettable.

 At the Market Stage of ZNA 2026, Triple Distilled Disco Squad delivers a unique "Disco Techno from Beyond" journey, combining eclectic rhythms, hypnotic grooves, and playful energy. Expect an unpredictable, joyous ride for the dancefloor, full of surprises, unicorn vibes, and sonic storytelling that only Alex can conjure.

[](https://soundcloud.com/boshkebeatsrecords/sets/triple-distilled-disco-squad)

We use cookies on our website to give you the most relevant experience by remembering your preferences and repeat visits. By clicking “Accept”, you consent to the use of ALL the cookies.

[Read More](https://znagathering.com/privacy-cookie-policy/)[Cookie settings](https://znagathering.com/program/marketstage/)[ACCEPT](https://znagathering.com/program/marketstage/)

Privacy Policy

Close

#### Privacy Overview

This website uses cookies to improve your experience while you navigate through the website. Out of these cookies, the cookies that are categorized as necessary are stored on your browser as they are essential for the working of basic functionalities...

[](https://znagathering.com/program/marketstage/)

[Necessary](https://znagathering.com/program/marketstage/)

- [x] Necessary 

Always Enabled

 Necessary cookies are absolutely essential for the website to function properly. This category only includes cookies that ensures basic functionalities and security features of the website. These cookies do not store any personal information. 

[Non-necessary](https://znagathering.com/program/marketstage/)

- [x] Non-necessary 

 Any cookies that may not be particularly necessary for the website to function and is used specifically to collect user personal data via analytics, ads, other embedded contents are termed as non-necessary cookies. It is mandatory to procure user consent prior to running these cookies on your website. 

[SAVE & ACCEPT](https://znagathering.com/program/marketstage/)
